creator: cpiazza@home.net
text:
Update to 1.4.0 and add a WWW: tag in DESCR.
I'm the maintainer.

Fix: 

-Chris--ZI7h4fBPBhvCniQrYXemjqW6Gbp7BEWxtVVKuaBxvX0ff0jD

Index: mixer.app/Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /cvs/FreeBSD/ports/audio/mixer.app/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.4
diff -u -r1.4 Makefile
--- Makefile	1999/05/05 13:50:15	1.4
+++ Makefile	1999/05/09 19:03:32
@@ -1,13 +1,13 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:  	mixer.app
-# Version required:	1.3.3
+# Version required:	1.4.0
 # Date created:		16 April 1999
 # Whom:			Chris Piazza <cpiazza@home.net>
 #
 # $Id: Makefile,v 1.4 1999/05/05 13:50:15 flathill Exp $
 #
 
-DISTNAME=	Mixer.app-1.3.3
-PKGNAME=	mixer.app-1.3.3
+DISTNAME=	Mixer.app-1.4.0
+PKGNAME=	mixer.app-1.4.0
 CATEGORIES=	audio
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.student.hk-r.se/~pt96pli/mixer/
